Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); store=d.get\('store',{}\); init=store.get\('initDataObj',{}\); goods=init.get\('goods',d.get\('goods',{}\)\); print\({k:v for k,v in goods.items\(\) if 'id' in k.lower\(\) or 'name' in k.lower\(\) or 'ID' in k}\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); store=d.get\('store',{}\); init=store.get\('initDataObj',{}\); goods=init.get\('goods',d.get\('goods',{}\)\); print\(list\(goods.keys\(\)\)[:30]\)")

Bash(xargs -I{} python3 -c " import json, sys, os path = '{}' d = json.load\(open\(path\)\) store = d.get\('store',{}\) init = store.get\('initDataObj',{}\) goods = init.get\('goods', d.get\('goods', {}\)\) goods_id_fields = {k: v for k, v in goods.items\(\) if 'id' in k.lower\(\)} file_id = os.path.basename\(path\).replace\('pxx_',''\).replace\('_rawdata.json',''\) goodsID = goods.get\('goodsID', goods.get\('goodsId', goods.get\('goods_id', ''\)\)\) if str\(goodsID\) != file_id: print\(f'MISMATCH: file={file_id}, goodsID={goodsID}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys, os import subprocess result = subprocess.run\(['find', '/Users/fly/Library/Application Support/maserati/collected-products', '-name', 'pxx_*_rawdata.json'], capture_output=True, text=True\) paths = result.stdout.strip\(\).split\('\\n'\) for path in paths[:10]: if not path: continue try: d = json.load\(open\(path\)\) store = d.get\('store',{}\) init = store.get\('initDataObj',{}\) goods = init.get\('goods', d.get\('goods', {}\)\) file_id = os.path.basename\(path\).replace\('pxx_',''\).replace\('_rawdata.json',''\) goodsID = str\(goods.get\('goodsID', goods.get\('goodsId', goods.get\('goods_id', ''\)\)\)\) if goodsID != file_id: print\(f'MISMATCH: file={file_id}, goodsID={goodsID}, all_id_fields={dict\(\(k,v\) for k,v in goods.items\(\) if \\"id\\" in k.lower\(\)\)}'\) else: print\(f'OK: {file_id}'\) except Exception as e: print\(f'ERROR {path}: {e}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys, os, subprocess result = subprocess.run\(['find', '/Users/fly/Library/Application Support/maserati/collected-products', '-name', 'pxx_*_rawdata.json'], capture_output=True, text=True\) paths = result.stdout.strip\(\).split\('\\n'\) for path in paths: if not path: continue try: d = json.load\(open\(path\)\) store = d.get\('store',{}\) init = store.get\('initDataObj',{}\) goods = init.get\('goods', d.get\('goods', {}\)\) file_id = os.path.basename\(path\).replace\('pxx_',''\).replace\('_rawdata.json',''\) goodsID = str\(goods.get\('goodsID', goods.get\('goodsId', goods.get\('goods_id', ''\)\)\)\) if goodsID != file_id: print\(f'MISMATCH: file={file_id}, goodsID={goodsID}'\) except Exception as e: pass ")
